title: Westinghouse-Amrail R68 for MTR 4.0
description: A Resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod that allows you to set rolling stock of R68 Subway cars as seen on the New York City Subway.
body:
A Resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod that allows you to set rolling stock of R68 Subway cars as seen on the New York City Subway.

Minecraft Transit Railway Mod 4.0 is required for this to work. You can download it here: https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway

Notes: 
- Audio & some textures were sourced from OpenBVE.

- "(W.R.N)" = White Route Number

- "(B.R.N)" = Black Route Number
